subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! Upon thee be the salutations of God, His tender mercies, His favors, His bounty and His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین علیک سلام الله و عنایاته و الطافه و جوده و فضله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @goodly deeds; actions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
